reviews.text: Wonderful and seamless experience. I would recommend them to anyone who is looking for an attorney.

Working with Michael Kennedy has been an absolute blessing. For years, Michael and his father have been by our side, fighting tirelessly to secure justice for my father’s case. His unparalleled attention to detail and steadfast commitment made all the difference. We won our judgment in court, and it simply wouldn’t have been possible without Michael’s expertise, dedication, and unwavering support.

From the very beginning, Michael has been with us every step of the way. He made an incredibly stressful and emotional process feel manageable, always treating us with kindness, courtesy, and respect. No question was too small, no concern too insignificant. His accessibility and willingness to address every issue with patience and care were truly remarkable.

On behalf of my mother and me, we cannot thank Michael enough. His work has changed our lives forever. More importantly, he brought us the justice we so desperately sought, allowing our family to find peace and move forward after the most traumatic experience of our lives.

Michael, you’ve given my father the dignity he deserved, and for that, we will always be grateful. Thank you for your relentless hard work and for being a source of strength when we needed it most. You’ve made a lasting impact on our family, and we will forever be in your debt. Thank you for everything.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for sharing your heartfelt experience, Ronald. We are truly honored to have been able to assist your family during such a challenging time. Your kind words about Michael and the team mean the world to us, and we are grateful for the trust you placed in us. It’s our privilege to have been a part of securing justice for your father and bringing peace to your family. If there is anything else you need, please know we are here for you.

reviews.text:

I would express my profound gratitude for your diligent representation in my recent case. Your expertise and determination were pivotal in the case's favorable outcome.

reviews.text:
In November 2019, I had the misfortune of being hit by a car (as a pedestrian). My head hit the pavement hard and the concussion and other symptoms that ensued were rough.  A couple months post accident, at the advice of my insurance agent and friend, I contacted Mike about the injury.  He very calmly and assuredly guided me through the process of collecting an insurance payment.  While everything is unknown in a case like this, Mike had a very solid idea of how our situation would go early on and he ended up being 100% correct, securing me the best possible outcome.  In addition, he was always reassuring and kind.  He knew I was suffering and was a caring ear at times when I felt a bit overwhelmed with all the details.  Our process hit a number of forks in the road along the way and I believe his guidance was outstanding each time a decision needed to be made.  He was always incredibly thoughtful to be sure I understood the situation and gave me all the information I needed to make my own decisions on how to go forward. I would wholeheartedly
recommend Mike and his team to anyone in a similar situation.  While I wish I never needed to make that call,  I couldn't have been more pleased to have him guide me along the way.

Ryan O’Neil was truly a lifesaver for our family. My son was accused of extremely serious misconduct by more than one accuser, and the situation initially felt overwhelming. Ryan skillfully used technology and evidence to fully clear my son’s name in both the civil and criminal matters.
Just as important as his legal expertise was Ryan’s calm, measured approach throughout the process. During an incredibly stressful time, he reassured our family, stayed focused on the facts, and helped us believe that the truth would ultimately come out. What seemed like an impossible situation ended with the best possible outcome. Ryan was honest from the beginning about how difficult the case could be, but he also made it clear that he would do everything in his power to ensure that a rare but very real situation would not destroy our lives.

We are deeply grateful for his dedication, professionalism, and compassion.

Caitlin M Sell, My family and I would like to thank you for all that you have done for us during this most unbelievably stressful time. Your work ethic, analytical thinking, and excellent representation solved our dilemmas and then went far and beyond any expectations. There is no other lawyer that we would rather have in our corner. Please know that you are much appreciated.

He gave such a detailed consultation about everything I needed to do just in case I did this on my own. I have a complicated DV case as the victim. This was handled with so much compassion and honesty. He even gave referrals in case I needed one. At the very least, if you don’t hire him, get a consultation because he cares. I know he’d fight super hard for you and for me. It’s 1000% worth it.

Going through a Title IX case at an Ivy League school is one of the most stressful experiences a student can have. I remember when my son was first served with his complaint, and he told me he felt that everything he had ever worked for was about to be taken away from him because of something that he didn't do. We found Mark's firm through a family friend, and after meeting with a few different firms, we chose Mark as our counsel given that he always presented us with the truth and helped us face realities head-on, no matter how difficult or scary those realities were.

Honesty, communication, and collaboration were always what set Mark apart from everyone else we spoke with. We truly credit him with saving our son's career and his entire future. Throughout such a stressful process, there really is nobody our family would recommend more for you to have by your side. I truly believe that we wouldn't be in the position we are today without Mark's help.

Mark always worked personally with our family in a way that went above and beyond every expectation. From serving as a level-headed guide throughout an emotionally charged process to dissecting every detail in the investigation report with the highest level of care and competence, he always gave the best possible counsel and presented us with every option. He was never afraid to take on the university if necessary and made absolutely certain that it was a fair process from start to finish.

Mark's firm will connect you with a full suite of resources, from private investigators to therapists, but notably, you will always have the high level of partner involvement and a personal touch that you likely I will not get from working with a larger firm. This gives you the best of both worlds, and is just one of the many reasons that I would, unequivocally and with the utmost confidence, recommend Mark Sherman and his firm.

Caitlin Sell & Mark Sherman (as well as the whole firm) are an incredible team.  From the very beginning, they were always available (weekends, nights) & so patient with me.  I faced an unexpected & tough legal situation and they held my hand every step of the way.  They saw me through tears & setbacks and I never once felt judged.  Caitlin was my main point of contact & a true gem.  Her ability to work with judges, prosecutors & other stakeholders is truly top notch.  Consequences, outcomes, & processes were always fully explained to me.  When I or my family had questions, we were met with patience.  Caitlin is thorough, genuine, honest, supportive, extremely knowledgable, and acted with the upmost integrity.  She’s truly remarkable.  Even with a number of violations, Caitlin led me to the best possible outcome I could have imagined.

Lastly, not only did they help me legally, they connected me with community support & resources who helped me through a very tough time.

I could not be more thankful for their incredible support & understanding during a very difficult time.  I wholeheartedly believe I would not be where I am today without Caitlin or Mark.

I used this firm finding it through searching on google to find an attorney as it was the first time I’ve needed to go to court, I worked with Caitlin sell and a few others. They handled my case very smoothly, they listened to any and all concerns and walked me through the process every step of the way. I am happy with the turnout as they got the case dropped and you definitely get what you pay for going through them. They talked me through different possibilities and outcomes and made sure I was aware and understood everything that was going on as well as making sure to check in before needing to appear at court to prepare you for what’s next. If you are seeking an attorney I would highly suggest hiring this firm.

Mark Sherman is the Johnny Cochrane of CT!  I was referred to him by an attorney friend of mine in Philadelphia. The guy is so on top of everything. He literally saved my life.  He is well connected and uses his relationships in a way that looks out for his client without pushing the other attorney; prosecutor; police etc. in a way that will compromise his relationships. Even the police told me after it was all over that I had the best lawyer.  He made himself available to us whenever we needed to talk; Vent and even cry.  When your life and freedom is on the line you need the best and Mark Is the very best of the best!!!

She took the time to hear me out, empathized, and then walked me through different scenarios and the plan moving forward.  I felt comfortable and confident in moving forward. She was able to obtain key evidence and the ticket was dismissed.  I am so grateful.  I hope I never need an attorney again, but if I did, I will not hesitate to reach out to Attorney Juliana Velez from The Law Offices of Mark Sherman. - Kay
I have court tomorrow and had serious questions! Called this office early in the morning and got an answer immediately! Mark gave me lots of advice and told me what to do so grateful!!

I needed a lawyer after a DUI arrest, and this office was recommended to me. I’ll share some details of my case for anyone my review might help. I know I was scrolling through this page too when I was first considering whether getting a lawyer was the right move for me. Mark got back to me promptly after I reached out, asked me to explain the details of my arrest, and helped me weigh the pros and cons of hiring his firm given my circumstances with great honesty, which I really appreciated. I made some rookie mistakes at the time of my arrest (like admitting I had been drinking), but I was also barely over the .08 limit.

At the end of the day, two major factors made hiring someone the best choice for me. First, I really didn’t want to risk a license suspension or an interlock device in my car if it could be avoided. Second, trust me, this process is beyond complicated and stressful to handle alone. Everyone’s case is different, and your BAC level along with other factors you wouldn’t even think of can really affect how things ultimately play out for you. It’s not only smart but emotionally reassuring to have a team of people who know what they’re doing handle the hard work and have your back throughout the process, knowing you’ve done everything you can for yourself and your case.

Juliana was my primary point of contact and was assigned to the criminal side of my case. Caitlin handled the DMV side of things. Both of these ladies were an absolute pleasure to work with and were very transparent with me from day one. Juliana went above and beyond to keep me informed of every detail, tracked all my deadlines (IID install, paperwork, classes, you name it), and handled every court appearance while I did the rest (which was very little) virtually. Without their help, I honestly feel I could’ve missed deadlines and dragged the whole process out even longer. Yes, the headache can turn into a nightmare by missing small deadlines or making small mistakes, and if you’re juggling a lot in your normal life, that’s a real risk. They provided amazing moral support and were incredibly patient with me through the whole ordeal. My case was eventually dismissed in court.

If you’re weighing your options about whether you need assistance in a similar situation, I highly recommend taking the first step and just reaching out. The entire team is incredibly friendly and kind, and they will talk you through your options. Nothing to lose by just taking that first step. And to the firm, thank you again to everyone for all of your hard work and help!

I never expected to find myself needing a criminal attorney, but after experiencing a real-life “Fatal Attraction” situation, I knew I needed strong guidance and protection. I found Mark Sherman online at a time when I truly didn’t know who to trust. The reviews and articles I came across made it clear that choosing Mark was a no-brainer — and from the moment I met him, I understood why.

My fears disappeared almost immediately. Mark made me feel seen, heard, and genuinely protected, and I knew right away that I was in the best possible hands. I walked into the consultation feeling intimidated, but within minutes, his professionalism, deep knowledge, and ability to add the right touch of humor put me completely at ease.

I am truly fortunate to know Mark and incredibly grateful to have him in my corner.
Mark was a big help and put my mind at ease. I would recommend him over and over again. Thank you Mark.

The entire team was extremely professional, knowledgeable, and helpful throughout the process. Juliana, who was assigned to my case, went above and beyond. She kept me informed of every detail and every option available, consistently emailing me updates. After each court appearance, she contacted me right away to explain what was discussed. I truly appreciated her communication and professionalism. She was also always available for questions,and always made time to communicate.

Mark Sherman is simply an amazing attorney .As your lead counsel or as “quarterback” for or lead to organize other lawyers involved in your case as in my circumstances . I had a domestic dispute which was far upstate and mark who may be a little pricey but well worth it . The prompt was Mark answers the phone and stays in touch and most importantly on top of all issues that needed to be handled .
In the end my case was dismissed . The simple fact is unfortunately I have had several court issues and had to deal with other attorneys and there is nobody I would want in my side other than Mark Sherman. Also his entire staff follows Marks lead in effort and care.

Mark is the best in the business. Always professional and prompt. Was stuck in a bind and he got me out of it as quick as possible. Cant say ebough good things. He always has your back no matter what. Would reccomend again under any circumstance. He is the one. Thanks again Mark!

This summer, I was in an unfortunate situation and needed a criminal attorney with expertise in DCF cases. My respected family law attorney referred me to Mark Sherman, he said they were the best and I am forever grateful. This was a highly emotionally charged situation for me and one I’ve never been in before and Mark walked me through each process thoroughly and carefully. Not only did Mark and his partner Amanda D’Elia, respond immediately, they answered calls whenever the time, night and day.

Are they connected? Yes. Mark had the cell phones of the DCF agents, and DCF lawyer and they always picked up his call.

They are some of the most honest lawyers I’ve met and they don’t sugarcoat the reality or make false promises and were willing to give tough advice even when I didn’t want to hear it but unfortunately needed it. Mark even refused to take more money because all he cared about was getting me the best result at the most cost effective rate. A rare trait in business but definitely helped me prioritize so I could focus on what was important and not worry as much about my wallet. I was relieved to know that the firm is familiar with the judges and the judges know them. Amanda is a dynamic litigator who is tenacious while being supportive which I needed as I had never been through a court case before. She guided me through every step of the legal process with ease and clarity. I felt confident going to court knowing these guys had my back. They know criminal and DCF cases and proved it again and again. They make a complicated system, more manageable for people like me who have never experienced any of this before and can become disheartened by the legal system. I am grateful to them for the support and time they gave me in my case and I would recommend this law firm to anyone needing this type of legal assistance. Truly, the best of the best. I don’t know how I would have gotten through these last couple of months without them.

If you need the scariest BIG BAD WOLF on your side, to get you ACTUAL results, Mark IS literally your answer!! He is the top dawg around, and the absolute go to for anyone who wants the best of the best in representation on every angle possible. He is well respected by the courts and personnel, and knows the ins and outs of the system. He is available, present, and realistic. Having known him for decades both personally and professionally,  hands down entrust him with my own families lives without fail.

Are you or someone you know being harassed or bullied??? If you need someone on your side, without question, this is who you go to. Attorney Mark Sherman is exceptional with handling these issues. He handles even the most complex of situations quickly and effectively. Highly recommend!!!!

They are truly the best of the best both personally and professionally. From the very inception of a case until the very end Mark and his firm are there to diligently guide you along the way. Unlike some attorneys who go days without responding they are there every step of the way leaving no question unanswered or stone unturned fighting for your utmost best interest at some of the worst times of our lives. They are true experts in their field and I wouldn’t trust anyone else without question !!

Despite being located in Stamford, Connecticut, they have helped fight for and assist friends and family on various issues in the Milford area.  They make you feel very comfortable that they are reachable and that your court system is not too far away for them to represent you.

I have had the pleasure of working with Mark and his firm in a professional capacity for over a decade. He is experienced, knowledgeable and a standout in his field. I have referred clients as well as friends to Mark in my capacity as a consultant working with high end matrimonial firms and each time the outcome has been incredibly favorable. When he is engaged, these people are seeing some of the worst times of their lives, and are overwhelmed to say the least. Mark’s  calm approach and deliberate plan to assist them is something that is necessary and beyond appreciated by both the client and me as the referral source. I would never hesitate to reccomend him and his office to anyone who finds themselves in need of superior defense counsel. I always say, “Don’t worry, we have Sherm on speed dial!”

We had the pleasure of working with Attorney Juliana Vélez, and she exceeded every expectation.
Juliana was incredibly professional, responsive, and efficient throughout the entire process. She took the time to explain every step clearly, made everything easy to understand, and was always there when we needed her guidance.
Her dedication and attention to detail made a complex situation feel simple and stress-free. We're so grateful for her help and truly believe she deserves recognition for the outstanding service she provides to her clients.

Mark and Christine were a pleasure to work with from start to finish. I found them after thorough due dillegence in trying to find the right person for the job. Countless phone calls with other attorneys and then I found Mark on google. Watched his awesome video commercial on his website and decided to give him a call!

I walked in with one of the most publicized motor vehicle cases in Connecticut, where the territory was unknown as my case was solely based off Social Media videos as evidence which is still a grey area in Law where not many cases like this have popped up. They still navigated through like it was an every day run of the mill case.

In the end, I feel walked away with the best deal I could have gotten in this case, on these terms. The prosecutor was very unforgiving and was not willing to budge. Had I gone in there alone, or with any other attorney, I don't think the plea deal would have been as favorable as it was.

Hopefully I don't ever need Mark's services again, but in the case I did, I would go right back to him!

Could not be more grateful for the incredible work Mark did on our criminal case we filed in Fairfield county, CT. Mark came highly recommended and he didn’t disappoint. From the very first call he was highly responsive, always keeping me informed and answering every question with patience and clarity. His diligence and attention to detail was evident throughout the entire process — nothing was overlooked.
When it came time for execution, his strategic thinking and courtroom skill truly shined. Thanks to his professionalism and expertise, we achieved a solid win that exceeded my expectations.
If you’re looking for a lawyer who genuinely cares, works tirelessly for your best outcome, and delivers results, I wholeheartedly recommend Mark and the Law Offices of Mark Sherman LLC. They’re simply the best.

Extremely professional and easy to work with.  A seamless process from the from the first phone call to the last case.  The staff was very swift with their communications to get the ball rolling and were very good with followup. Several tickets for teenagers were dismissed for a charitable contribution.   Hoping we don’t need their services again, but highly recommend!!!
excellent very helpful to me!

Attorney Mark Sherman was extremely helpful and so compassionate about our situation. He gave much information in such a short amount of time that was extremely helpful. After our conversation I was left feeling much better than before. I would utilize him again 100%.

I couldnt be happier with choosing the law offices of Mark Sherman. From the day i received my target letter until the day of my sentencing in the bridegport federal court which was 2 years after I received the letter they not once made me feel like I made the wrong decision, or were just there for the money. From day one they were very realistic and told me how it could end up instead of sugar coating or giving me false hope. I was charged with possession and willing to distribute narcotics. Mark and Christine gave me a guideline to follow as if they were my parents and would constantly check up on me to make sure I was staying on track and doing everything positive.  As time went by, not only did they helped me during the case but it made me a better human being, a better father, a better businessman , even contributing back to the community felt good. Christine was awesome. We spoke so much that she literally felt like a friend not my attorney. Thankfully, with their knowledge of the law and seeing the person I actually am and not the person that was indicted.  They build up such a strong case that even the judge and everyone in that courtroom was impressed.  They were able to get me out with the absolute minimum and no jail time. I would highly recommend the law offices of Mark Sherman 100 /100 times. They really treat you like family and care about you not just the money.

Christine Landis, of The Law Offices of Mark Sherman, LLC, was precisely the guiding hand we needed to successfully navigate the Connecticut legal system, and to prevail in our case. Confident, reassuring, wise, and shrewd, we followed her advice to the letter and happily achieved the outcome she predicted. I would unhesitatingly recommend her to anyone in need of her area of legal expertise.

I have worked with Mark Sherman on two occasions and he is a phenomenal attorney. I was facing serious charges and he got the case dismissed. He guided me through the process with the utmost patience, empathy, and professionalism. He helped me out again in successfully getting associated negative press from the arrest removed from the internet. Mark is remarkably dedicated, kind, and persistent in his work. He is incredibly knowledgeable, experienced, and a clear and effective communicator. Having Mark in my corner has helped to dramatically shift my life in a positive direction and I’m forever grateful to him. Hiring Mark was one of the best decisions I’ve made in my life. I felt supported, he alleviated a substantial amount of stress, and restored hope for my future. I can’t recommend him enough.

If threatening your soon-to-be ex-husband and his five-year side project (aka his mistress) is wrong, then I don’t want to be right—and thankfully, with Mark Sherman in my corner, he was able to clear me of any criminal charges. After getting into a not so friendly “chat exchange” with my soon to be ex and his girlfriend, I needed directions from my divorce attorney who highly recommended Mark and they said “ this is who you need to contact NOW.”

This man is not only a top-notch criminal attorney by his track record, but now also the unofficial patron saint of scorned women everywhere. He listened to my saga like a therapist, responded faster than my ex ever did to a text, and somehow knew everyone in the Danbury courthouse.

Any woman who’s been pushed past her breaking point would understand my… let’s call it “spirited communication.” And when you find yourself in that perfectly justifiable-but-legally-questionable position, you’ll want Mark Sherman and his firm by your side.

Highly attentive, endlessly responsive, and apparently on a first-name basis with half the judicial system. He was also very compassionate with my issue at hand and never once made me feel like the crazy woman I've been made out to be. This is definitely the lawyer you want when life gets messy. 10/10 would recommend!

Losing my 12-year-old son was the most devastating experience of my life. In the middle of that grief, confusion, and unimaginable pain, Patrick Filan and his team became a source of stability, strength, and protection for my family. They treated my son’s case with the seriousness, respect, and relentless dedication it deserved.

From the very first meeting, Patrick listened. He never rushed me, never dismissed my fears, and never made me feel like just another client. He and his team honored my child as a person, not a case file. Every step of the legal process was explained with compassion and clarity, and they consistently went above and beyond to make sure we understood what was happening and why.

Their commitment to uncovering the truth, holding the responsible parties accountable, and fighting for justice was unwavering. Patrick worked tirelessly, with meticulous attention to detail, and his communication was always timely, honest, and reassuring. In one of the darkest periods of my life, he and his team gave me something I didn’t think I would feel again: a sense of safety and support.

I am forever grateful to Patrick Filan and his team for standing with us, for advocating for my son when I no longer could, and for carrying the weight of this legal battle so I could focus on surviving emotionally. They brought professionalism, humanity, and heart to every interaction.

If you are searching for a legal team that will treat your family’s tragedy with dignity and fight for justice with true conviction, I cannot recommend Patrick Filan and his team highly enough. They made an unbearable journey a little less isolating, and for that, my family and I will always be thankful.

Attorney Filan and his team were exceptional throughout my case. He demonstrated remarkable compassion and a steadfast commitment to achieving justice. His extensive knowledge was evident at every stage, and he made sure I was informed and supported during several years of diligent work. I highly recommend him and his firm—truly outstanding representation.

reviews.text: Mr. Lasko is a very knowledgeable and compassionate attorney. He walked us through everything with clear and concise information and was always available for questions. My father was a municipal employee with over 37 years of service.  Dad enjoyed working and therefore did not want to retire and kept working.  He passed unexpectedly.  In that he had not retired, he passed without applying for his pension.  Nor was there a will.

My father, a Veteran, also worked for the State of Connecticut and had taken early retirement from that job.  When my father passed, Attorney Lasko advised and worked with me on the probate of my father’s estate.  Through some sort of administrative oversight, both the State and Municipality denied my mother any survivorship rights in either of my father’s pensions.  As to both pensions, somehow, at the time of my father’s demise, the state and municipality had my father listed as a single person, [which was not the case] and used that as a basis to deny benefits to my mother.  Attorney Lasko was retained on these issues and fought with both the municipality and the State on these issues.  Through dogged determination, unwavering commitment, keen legal insight and a great deal of tenacity, while avoiding protracted litigation with the municipality, Attorney Lasko was able to obtain a full lifetime annuity for my mother as her entitled survivor benefits in my father’s municipal pension.  Attorney Lasko’s keen insight and quick action saved the day and prevented irretrievable municipal action which could have severely jeopardized my mother’s rights.   As to my father’s state pension, through an unwavering fight of  administrative appeals at the State level and court action, Attorney Lasko was able render from the State my mother’s full survivor benefits in my Father’s state Pension.  With these funds, my mother was able to more fully provide for the needs of herself and family.

For timely, tempered, quick action in Critical Matters, I recommend Attorney Lasko. Attorney Lasko does not quit, he leaves no stone unturned and delivers results beyond expectations!  Especially when it comes to issues of pension Rights!

When I needed legal assistance with a work-related issue, I learned that most labor lawyers focus more on workers compensation matters and do not want to work with public employees, particularly those in unions.  After being turned down by one labor lawyer after another, I was very fortunate to find and secure the legal services of Attorney William Lasko.  Attorney Lasko has a strong background in labor and union law which was invaluable in working through my issues.  I highly recommend him to public employees and others who are faced with labor issues.

Pamela

Review posted at client's request

I was involved in a car accident in which my car was totaled and I suffered several injuries. After consulting with Bill he agreed to take my case and I hired him. Bill was tenacious with the two insurance companies that were involved. He was a bulldog with the way he went about handling my case. He kept the expenses to a minimum and negotiated a maximum settlement. Bill kept me apprised every step of the way and there were never any surprises. He exceeded all my expectations. I could not be happier with Bill as an attorney and would recommend him to anyone.
Mr. Lasko is a highly skilled attorney.  His firm is  attentive and knowledgeable to the law. I would highly recommend him.

I recently sat down with Mr. Lasko regarding a CHRO/EEOC complaint against my former employer. After 1.5 hours I was ready to be done. But things were just warming up.

Mr. Lasko often went on short tangents about things unrelated to determining if I had a case worth pursuing. Most of which were personal opinions that he treated as fact. Here are a couple of the better tangents that he went on. He told me that he doesn’t believe I have a mental disorder, even though I have two medical providers saying otherwise. That was after he told me that my medical provider in charge of prescribing my medications was a fraud because she was an APRN, not a MD. Others were about podcasts I needed to listen to, books I needed to read, or the same court rulings/laws I needed to check out over and over again.

At the hour and a half point of my consultation, after one of his tangents, I did tell him that I could not afford to go into a second hour, but he kept pushing on. He did end up capping my price at $450, which is good, because he probably would have kept blabbing and made me pay for the full 3 hrs, if not more.

Upon using PayPal (which seems highly unprofessional for a lawyer) to create my consultation invoice, he continually spelled my email wrong. Even after many times of correcting him. He ended up sending it to some email, but it wasn’t mine. It was spelled wrong again. I ended up having to just put in my CC info at his computer as the email he sent didn’t arrive. Obviously.

He did seem knowledgeable about the subject matter, but given the added fluff, there is no way I’d hire him to represent me.

If you find yourself going into a consultation with Mr. Lasko, do not make the same mistakes I did. Pay for the first hour, watch the clock, and do not entertain him when he gets off the case matter. He will ramble right through each hour if you let him.

reviews.text: My federal criminal case was broadcasted all over the country. Being in federal court is one of the most intimidating experiences one can experience. My case was out of state, and it was good to know that my lawyer was recognized outside of Connecticut as a no-nonsense criminal lawyer, unafraid to challenge the government's charges. When i was charged, even before my case was fully heard, i was left without a job, and was even told by my University that i may not be able to graduate. Steve helped with all of these matters, in addition to resolving my federal case. I am now employed, with two degrees, and my case was resolved in a way that preserved my freedom and my dignity.  I don't know what my family and i would have done without Stephen Seeger. I can never fully repay him for the eloquent and tenacious fight he put up for me in federal court. God bless him!

reviews.text:
If you’re looking for a lawyer who truly understands how the system works and will fight for you with honesty, integrity, and unmatched expertise, Lindy Urso is the one. He is not just a lawyer—he’s a legend in the courthouse, respected by everyone and always going out of his way to help people.

One of the things that sets Lindy apart is his deep understanding of how the system can be unfair—he knows that police often overcharge people, sometimes based on weak or exaggerated claims. In my case, a drunken statement from a family member was all it took for the police to run with it and throw wild charges at me. Lindy saw through it immediately and made sure that I got the best possible outcome, even when my instincts told me to fight in court. He explained the realities of the legal system, showing me that a long court battle would have cost me more time, more money, and unnecessary stress—he guided me toward the smartest choice, not just the most aggressive one.

Lindy is a fighter for truth and freedom, and he doesn’t just tell you what you want to hear—he tells you what you need to hear. He’s a straight shooter, a sharp strategist, and most importantly, a lawyer who genuinely cares. Even when he was going through a serious personal situation, he never let it affect his commitment to my case. He was always there when needed, making sure I was protected and informed every step of the way.

I can’t recommend Lindy Urso enough—if you need someone who knows the law, fights for justice, and truly looks out for your best interests, he is the one you want in your corner. An outstanding lawyer and an even better person.
reviews.ownerResponse: I am glad to have been able to help.  Your comments are greatly appreciated.  Thank you.

I do not typically share negative experiences publicly however, I felt this was necessary to share in order to help others.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Dear Mr. Leonardo,

I'm sorry that you were unhappy with your experience working with me. I always strive to get the best results I can for my clients. Unfortunately, pursuant to the Rules of Practice, I am ethically not allowed to give you a copy of your file which I explained to you when you asked for them. This is also why I requested you come to the office and review it with me. With regard to your statement that I have not shared the file with your current attorney I checked to make sure it did not get overlooked. I am relieved to tell you that I emailed the file to your new attorney the first week of November. Finally, my retainer agreement states, and I always tell my clients, I can make no promises or guarantees because ultimately the discretionary power to resolve your case does not reside with me. As I told you the last time I saw you and notwithstanding your current review, I sincerely hope you get the best result possible in your current legal matter.

reviews.ownerResponse:
We’re genuinely disappointed to read this review, as it does not accurately reflect the handling or outcome of your case. If there are lingering concerns or misunderstandings, we sincerely invite you to reach out to us directly. We are committed to upholding the highest standards of professionalism and client care, and we’d welcome the opportunity to address any remaining issues personally.

reviews.text: Attorney Lebedevitch was extremely knowledgeable and reassuring. I wanted to share my experience for others who need to hire an attorney. Please know you are in very good and professional hands with this team!

Lebedevitch Law Firm handled my infarction case with professionalism and efficiency. They were clear, responsive, and delivered a great outcome. I highly recommend them for anyone needing reliable legal support.
Thanks again, truly !
Is a bad experience in my process.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for sharing your feedback, and we are truly sorry to hear that you had a negative experience. However, after reviewing our records, we weren’t able to find any indication that we've worked together directly.
If there is something specific that you would like to bring to our attention, or if you believe this may be a misunderstanding, we’d be more than happy to talk further. reviews.text:
Sometimes you can hit the “Jackpot” with a Google search, and we did while looking for a new, local lawyer to draw up new wills and legal documents.
Peter and Lawrence Somma (Somma Law)  offer not only their professional, knowledgeable experience, they offer you a welcoming environment to meet in.  You are greeted by calming wind chimes on the door and their personable capable support staff.  If you’re lucky, their puppies might be wandering the office as well.
My sister and I were most comfortable discussing our personal concerns in the distribution of our assets through a Will as well as Power of Attorney and Living Will designees.  These were drawn, approved, finalized in a very short period of time.  Everything is set the way we want it to be.  We have no qualms in contacting Peter or Lawrence with questions or any other legal matters we may have.
Thank you Google search and most definitely, thank you Peter, Lawrence and your wonderful staff.
Excellent in every way. Helped me in a short time notice. “Love the fact it’s a family owned firm”.Thank you so much for working on my case Mr.Lawrence:)

My Ukrainian friend advised me to contact Lawrence for legal help. Lawrence solved my problem very professionally and quickly, I didn't even have to go to the court hearing. I received a payment and would definitely advise my friends to contact this office with any questions.

The team of Peter & Lawrence Somma is a first class duo of legal expertise.
They carved multiple documents distributing our wishes to children & grandchildren leaving us satisfied that our families have been well rewarded.

It was nice to find Peter Somma's office to handle my legal needs.  I will start from Ruth and Olivia his assistants, they were very helpful, professional and handle the communications fast and efficient.  I went there with a list of things I wanted to do with a living will, testament, proxy, etc. but wasn’t sure if I really needed all of them or if I was on the right path.  Peter was very helpful and had a good patience explaining the pros and cons of my entire list and was able to put together what I really needed which it was a more short and structured list.  There was no hassle or rush for me to review and sign what I was proposed, they allowed me time to review and analyze what was proposed and made adjustments where needed.  I was very happy with the service from the moment I walked in to his office.  I do recommend Peter’s business.

We had a great experience with Attorney Peter Somma, he was very thorough with the whole process from the day we chose the property to closing. Lawrence explained the process and answered all my questions. Gigi is the best! She texts back fast!! I recommend this law firm for anyone that needs a trustworthy lawyer in Stamford.

If I could give them zero stars I would. They treat clients professional and unfairly. I briefly spoke with my attorney. When I asked for my files to leave the office he walked out to the desk to retrieve them. The legal secretary followed him back in and told me they were missing and could not be located. I was told by my attorney that if they were found I would receive a call and they would be left at the security desk in the lobby. The legal secretary abruptly asked me to leave unprovoked and I became visibly upset at how I was being treated. She slammed the door behind me on the way out and told me that if I came back it would be considered trespassing. Never have I ever been spoken to or been treated like this. They should not be in business for the way they treat people or for allowing the staff to speak to people in this way.
reviews.ownerResponse: This negative review is directly related to the termination of this reviewer's relative who was recently discharged for misconduct.  Please take this reviewer's comments for what they are worth.

Fromzel/Kuperman Law has been a true lifeline for our family during an incredibly challenging immigration journey. We worked closely with Igor Kuperman, and his expertise, dedication, and persistence quite literally changed our lives.
Our case was especially complicated—not just because immigration law is complex, but because my wife and I were both born in Russia. Given the tense political relationship between the U.S. and Russia, it quickly became clear that we were dealing with more than standard red tape. USCIS made so many blatant errors that we started to wonder whether we were facing sheer incompetence or possible bias due to our country of birth.
Through it all, Igor stood by us as both an expert attorney and a compassionate human being. He didn’t just process documents—he fought for us. He leveraged his contacts within USCIS, and when necessary, he reached out to a Connecticut congressman's office, which played a crucial role in expediting and resolving our case.
To make things even more difficult, I was dealing with serious medical issues while overseas during part of the process. Most attorneys would have asked me to wait—but Igor made time to speak with me on the weekend. That personal commitment and humanity meant the world to us. My family will never forget how hard he fought for us during one of the most stressful times of our lives.
His partner, Alex Fromzel, also deserves high praise. His fluency in Spanish & Russian was a huge help when communicating or dealing with some of the finer points of translation of documents. His approachable, professional manner and strong legal background made a great impression, and we could tell we were in good hands with the entire team.
Fromzel/Kuperman Law serves both Connecticut and New York, and their firm offers expertise in:
• Business Law
• Civil Litigation
• Criminal Defense
• Family Law
• Landlord and Tenant Matters
• Employment Law
• Immigration Law
This is not a cookie-cutter law office. You deal directly with your attorneys—no assistants or runaround—and you get the kind of dedication and results that only come from people who genuinely care.
If you're looking for attorneys who combine deep legal expertise with personal commitment, Fromzel/Kuperman Law is the firm you can trust. We are forever grateful for what they did for us.

reviews.text: I met with Sharon for a consultation on a Child Support case. I had been preparing for a few weeks and had documents ready to turn over for a professional to take it and run with in court. Sharon met with me for an hour though I scheduled for 30 minutes. Reviewed my docs and provided invaluable guidance…then sent me on my way to represent myself. While it was the last vote of confidence I needed, it was also a display of nobility: at times like this we are willing to do and pay anything for our children but Sharon didn’t even think about a check and I’m sure her hour of time is worth a lot. I had what I needed and the priceless tweaks and advice Sharon gave helped me get everything I wanted and then some AS the defendant! This is the only review I’ve ever done AND I’ve included my name because I want all to know of the authenticity of this attorney; World-class! If you are in need of representation, I definitely recommend her…can only imagine what she can do in court herself if her guidance accomplishes so much.
