Chris Brennan and Anthony Sasso should not be involved in family court matters. In my experience, their handling of my case reflected a misunderstanding of family law practice and the realities of working with experienced counsel and judges. This led to unnecessary delays, missteps in strategy, and prolonged conflict. As a result, my case was negatively impacted for over a year, and I ultimately had to retain different counsel to correct course.

I had the privilege of being represented by Attorney Chris Brennan in a restraining order matter and Attorney Alissa Korwek in a post-divorce matter, and I cannot recommend them highly enough.
Both attorneys clearly know what they are doing. They are strategic, realistic, and incredibly effective. They fight hard when it matters, while remaining fair, level-headed, and professional at all times. What I appreciated most is that they focus on getting results without dragging cases out unnecessarily—something I have unfortunately experienced with other attorneys in the past.
Their billing is fair, reasonable and transparent, their communication is clear, and they respected both my time and resources. I felt informed, supported, and confident every step of the way.
Most importantly, I trust them 100%. If you are looking for attorneys who are competent, efficient, and truly advocate for their clients, I would not hesitate to recommend Chris Brennan and Alissa Korwek.

I am immensely grateful to my defence lawyer Anthony Sasso for the outstanding service and support I received during my divorce proceedings.
Going through divorce is not easy but the legal expertise and compassion from him and the chambers gave me profound peace to focus on my job as my legal needs are expertly and thoughtfully taken care of.
They kept me informed with every necessary details and allayed my fears whenever they came with their compassionate sense of professionalism.
They fought for my best possible outcome with integrity and skill.
Without hesitation I recommend them if you are looking for integrity, competence, and absolute commitment to get the job done

I recently worked with Attorney Sasso on my divorce. He was recommended by a long time friend who had worked with Anthony before in the past and had nothing but great things to say about working with him so I knew I didn't had to search very hard for someone to work with. I found him to be very personable and professional. Upon our first meeting, he asked all the right questions to understand my situation which made me feel comfortable and explained what the process would entail and the sequence of events that would follow. I found the response time in answering any concerns I had along the way were answered within 24 hours if not sooner. He kept me informed of all communications with the other side and felt he was proactive in making sure I was prepared for the next steps in the process. I never felt like I was just another case. He is extremely knowledgeable and realistic about what could be the possible outcomes and offered the good and the bad of each. We've all heard before the divorces can get really messy however that was not my experience, I felt he always had a "Let's get this done" attitude which is exactly what I was hoping for. Thank you Anthony for offering your best, I greatly appreciate it.

I hired Chris Brennan to handle my post-judgment matters for my divorce.  He was beyond successful at every Court appearance in achieving what I wanted.  My ex-wife had hired one attorney after another attorney to file one motion after another. It was beyond brutal!  Once I hired Chris all of that stopped as he was able to obtain judgments in my favor, ultimately getting her to back down.  I have referred a number of close friends and colleagues to Chris as he is a great attorney.  This was no easy case.  But Chris got it done. I HIGHLY recommend Chris.

Chris Brennan represented me throughout my very litigious divorce.  He gave me great advice throughout the entire process and was by side the entire time.  I strongly recommend using Chris if you are in a similar situation.

Chris Brennan represented my daughter in connection with her personal injury case.  He did a terrific job for her in filing a lawsuit and aggressively fighting for her.  In the end he secured a large verdict for her and we couldn’t be happier with the outcome.  I strongly recommend this attorney to anyone who has been injured and needs a good lawyer.

Christopher Brennan represented me in connection with my divorce. He was by my side through the entire process, protected my rights and stood up to my abusive controlling husband in court. I felt protected through the entire process.
Chris was always available when I needed to reach him and very responsive. He was smart and aggressive with the other side and very reasonable with my financial situation. He secured a very favourable amount of money for me.
I wouldn’t be able to make it without him. I will strongly recommend Chris for any woman that might be in my situation. He is an excellent attorney and great advocate.

Chris Brennan represented me for a divorce.  He guided me through the entire process and kept me informed every step of the way.  He protected my rights and I was very happy with the result.  I would recommend this great attorney to anyone going through this kind of situation.

I had high hopes going into my divorce proceedings with this firm, but unfortunately, my experience is far from satisfactory. The communication was terrible—I as adviced to sign documents that hurt my situation. Meetings were cancelled. I was always blamed for delay. Attorney Alissa Korwek seamed more concerned about need of opposing attorney -  accommodating other attorney needs in terms of time/schedule or agreement language.

I also felt that my attorney didn’t fully understand my situation or offer sound advice. They seemed disorganized - canceling my meetings due their internal time conflicts. On top of that, the advice I received was not only unhelpful, but it also costing me more in the long run due to poor decisions that were made without considering all of my options.

I can't help but feel that better representation would have led to a more favorable result.

I hired attorney Anthony Sasso for assistance with child custody issues and child safety issues I was having with my ex husband who was arrested on DV charges. Attorney Sasso was absent and unresponsive consistently. Which resulted in me still dealing with the same issues I had come to him for help with. I was not satisfied and made this known. I was able to negotiate my balance owed down because of the lack of representation I received. When it came time to make my agreed upon payment amount I was told they have no record of this. I regret my decision to use this firm. My child is the one who’s still not fully protected legally and suffering because of the inability of this firm to deliver on what was promised.

I, unfortunately did not have a good experience with this law firm.  Initially, I hired Kieran Costello to represent me in my divorce case.  At first, my experience with him was fine, he kept me abreast of developments in my case.  He eventually turned my case over to attorney Anthony Sasso and that is when my experiences went downhill.  He acted like he did not want anything to do with my case.  He did not keep me informed on developments in my case, was not responsive to my emails and phone calls and at times was downright dismissive, acting with disdain and nonchalance.  In his interactions with the opposing attorney, he began to believe false, unsubstantiated claims that were made by him and my ex wife regarding me.  Instead of speaking to me or asking me questions to find out particulars, it became apparent that he believed their words over mine.  To make it worse, he ghosted me on my case close to the time we were to go to court and showed a lack of professionalism and testicular fortitude seeing that he didn't even have the courage to give me an email/text/phone call indicating that he was doing so.  I wouldn't recommend doing business with this firm.
reviews.ownerResponse: We will not comment on the causes of the breakdown of our professional relationship.  As with any professional relationship, fit is important.  We are glad that you were able to find the right fit and wish you all the best.

reviews.text:
I cannot express enough gratitude for the exceptional service provided by Costello, Brennan, DeVidas, Sasso and Sinclair, P.C. throughout my divorce process. From the moment I walked into their office, I felt supported and understood.

Anthony Sasso, in particular, has been a beacon of professionalism and expertise. He took the time to understand the intricacies of my case and developed a strategy that protected my financial interests and ensured the best possible outcome for my children. His negotiation skills were top-notch, securing favorable terms without the need for prolonged litigation.

Anthony’s support extended beyond just legal representation. He was always available to answer my questions and provided clear, consistent communication, making a difficult time much more manageable. His dedication to my case was evident in every interaction, and his efforts in coordinating with tax attorneys to resolve related issues were invaluable.

The entire team at Costello, Brennan, DeVidas, Sasso and Sinclair, P.C. was professional, compassionate, and highly skilled. They made sure all my legal needs were met promptly and efficiently. I highly recommend their services to anyone in need of top-tier legal representation.

Thank you, Anthony, and the entire firm for your outstanding work!

I have used Costello, Brennan, DeVidas, Sasso and Sinclair, P.C. for a variety of matters - traffic court, wills, personal injury - over the years.  The attorneys and support staff have always been responsive and I have always been happy with the results and work product.
Chris Brennan represented me in a recent divorce.  I was very happy with his services and the case outcome.  I highly recommend Chris and team.

Could not ask for a better experience, given the unpleasant/difficult nature of the situation. If you're going to go through it, at least having representation that is professional, timely, and on top of it gives you one less thing to worry about. Highly recommend.

When dealing with a lawyer I wanted someone personable. I had the pleasure of working with Attorney Sean Plumb. I went through a very difficult divorce and child custody battle. His responsiveness, analytical skills, research and organizational skills were amazing.  He always listened to my every concern and he came very prepared for court each time. His knowledge and compassion made such a difference during this life changing time. I highly recommend working with Attorney Plumb you won’t have any regrets.
His legal representation restored my faith in the system.

I had the pleasure of working with Attorney Plumb. I trusted him to protect me in a complicated court matter and he succeeded my expectation. He listened to my every need that I had. He explained everything to me in terms I could easily understand. He was always very responsive when I had questions and he put me at ease.
If anyone if looking for a knowledgeable attorney and a great price, then go to Attorney Sean Plumb. I will work with this law office again.

I worked with Anthony Sasso of Costello, Brennan, DeVidas, Sasso and Sinclair, P.C. for my dissolution. I had a lot of ups and downs, postponements, questions, changes to orders, etc. Anthony was always patient with me and willing to do whatever I asked without making me feel judged or burdensome. I have legal insurance through my employer and was able to use it without an issue. In addition, when Anthony was unavailable, he put me in contact with another attorney who promptly picked up my case and helped out in the interim. I would absolutely refer anyone to their office, especially to Anthony. I seriously cannot thank him enough.

This place is a mess. So let’s go down the list of things that went wrong.
1. I found this firm through my benefit program with my employer. They gave me a claim number to give them. When I called and spoke to the front desk they told me I wouldn’t need it bc my benefit wouldn’t cover anything. That was a lie! They refused to fix this when talking to me. They ended up going back and forth with the company and adjusting my bill.
2. I paid my retainer and expected my lawyer to be with me on my court date. My lawyer never showed up. A replacement came afterwards and spoke to me about what happened and yes I was charged for the talk. The whole point is I didn’t want to go in alone. Who puts up a $7000 retainer for no one to show up?! Regardless if the other party showed up or not.
3. I would call the lawyer spoke to her for 5 minutes and get billed for 25 minutes. When the fee for talking to the lawyer is $500 an hour this matters. I was also billed for a 2 hr conversation that only went on for 45 minutes.
4. When calling their front desk they aren’t very friendly.
5. Everyone works for money. It’s when you take advantage and have no compassion that’s an issue. They know my situation. I hired them because I’m in a high stress situation and needed help navigating it. They add to the stress because I have to time the phone calls to make sure I was billed properly. Contact a social worker and have her pull her phone records to verify how long they spoke. This just shows a lack of integrity. As a single mother fighting who is dealing with legal issues this shouldn’t be a problem.
The only positive was the lawyer was actually nice (besides the billing issues).At the end of the day she helped me through a hard situation.
GOOD LUCK! I hope you all have a better experience than I.

Claire Devidas is a professional, great lawyer and a person with a big heart.  She helped me a lot with the issue of temporary custody of my son during a difficult period of my life, helped me resolve all issues with documents, was always in touch, supported me in court and literally saved my family.  Huge gratitude and respect.

Fantastic experience working with Claire and Kieran. They provided extraordinary guidance along the way and always welcomed my questions and thoughts. Incredibly patient but more importantly, they were consummate professionals and highly experienced. They know their stuff and aggressively act on the client’s behalf.

I recently had the pleasure of working with Linsey A. DeDomenico, Esq. Linsey took over my case after another attorney abandoned me. From day one she stepped right in, cut through the red tape and challenges, navigated my case as if she had been there from the beginning, kept my case on track, and was a strong advocate for me and my family. She is detail oriented making sure every base is covered. She is patient and worked hard for a positive outcome. Linsey was able to accomplish in mere months what the other attorney could not/had not accomplished in almost a year.  She worked tirelessly and maintained a calm, positive and professional demeanor at all times. Thank you, Lindsey.

I had the immense pleasure of working with Kieran Costello & Sean Plumb throughout my divorce process. Divorce is difficult enough on any individual but both Kieran & Sean couldn't have been more professional, knowledgeable & encouraging throughout the process (Kieran's sense of humor kept my spirits up as well)! They were there by my side & kept me updated every step of the way! The entire staff at this office is wonderful. I would HIGHLY recommend their services to anyone going through a difficult/challenging divorce. They will not disappoint!
From start to finish dealing with this firm and Cody Taylor, Esq. was an absolute pleasure.  Very professional and responsive.  Could not be more pleased and we are very grateful.

In a contentious divorce proceeding, I needed a robust litigation team. Costello, Brennan, DeVidas, Sasso and Sinclair was just what I needed. Attorney Kieran Costello, with his in-depth legal knowledge and Attorney Edward "Skip" Sinclair, with both his legal knowledge as well as his financial background, brought the case to a successful conclusion. I would recommend CBDSS to anyone.

Claire DeVidas will drag out your case , so that she earns more money, she does not have your best interest in mind. She wants to profit as much as possible off your divorce instead of resolving the issues and settling disputes.
reviews.ownerResponse: Ms. Thelen was not my client.  I represented her former husband who had no complaints about my legal services.  It should be pointed out that this divorce was settled with an agreement between the parties over 7 years ago and was completed in less than a year despite the complex nature of the case.

reviews.text: I hired Kieran Costello to represent me in my divorce and I couldn’t be happier. He is very responsive and kept me informed throughout the case. Kieran is very knowledgeable and, in my opinion, is the best in the field. Before I hired Kieran I wasn’t sure how I was going to be able to get through the process, but with his advice I was able to obtain a very favorable result that I didn’t think was possible.

Christopher Brennan is very rude,unorganized and unprofessional.He showed up late to my court date even missed one and sent a paralegal to substitute which resulted in my case being continued.Its now been over a year  and he drag my case just to make more money and does not do a good job representing or defending.im wondering how he passed the bar

I was recently represented by Claire DeVidas in my divorce.  Claire was knowledgable, efficient, empathetic and effective.  I interviewed several firms and am very glad I chose this one.  Highly recommend Claire and her firm.

Divorce is, almost without exception, a difficult and painful process. I am incredibly grateful to Kieran Costello, Megan Leffard, and everyone at Costello, Brennan, and DeVidas for guiding me through with expertise and compassion. They were professional, reliable, and communicative. I was never left wondering what was happening or why. When I reached out to give or receive information, responses came in a timely manner. I have recommended Kieran to a friend and will continue to recommend Kieran and Costello, Brennan, and DeVidas without hesitation. As my marriage deteriorated, I prayed for a miracle and found one. Many thanks for helping me navigate my way out of my previous situation and into my new life.

I hired Chris after getting seriously injured in a work place accident. He was able to fight the worker's comp. commission in order to reach a very favorable settlement for me.  I highly recommend Attorney Brennan.

Claire DeVidas defended me when my ex decided to file a motion to reduce his alimony payments. It was not easy but Claire was able to show that my ex was voluntarily lowering his income just to pay me less and won the hearing. I would recommend Claire to anyone the has to face the ugliness of the family courts, great attorney.

I first consulted with Kieran Costello, who was humorous but very knowledgeable. He then handed my case to Attorney Mitchell Teta.
Attorney Teta has been amazingly helpful and assertive in dealing with my child custody case. He is honest and direct, and continues to help me fight in court for the best interest of my child. I can't thank him enough for all he has done. Highly recommended firm and law office.
I would like to say that Attorney Mitchell Teta is a great attorney. He really helped me with my case.

I have referred Christopher Brennan to many of my clients. He has successfully closed several Real Estate transactions and has always delivered top notch service. Past clients have also retained Chris for evictions, misc. litigation and divorce with the same positive results. He is a diligent worker and always responds in a timely manner. I have only received positive feedback from my clients and will continue to refer Chris clients in the future.

I interviewed several law firms and was glad to have chosen Costello, Brennan and DeVidas.  Working with Attorney Teta and Attorney Sasso I always felt informed and protected.  I highly recommend this Firm.

I have enjoyed dealing with Kieran Costello over the last few years.  I always appreciate his direct and professional manner and his staff and partners are always courteous and professional.  I recommend Costello, Brennan, and DeVidas with confidence to anyone needing a good attorney.

After consulting with several different law firms I decided to go with Costello, Brennan and DeVidas to handle my probate case. I was extremely happy with their service. All the attorneys there were so helpful and knowledgeable.  I highly recommend them!

I was injured at work and was out for many months. I reached out to a close friend who gave me the name of a respectable law firm called Costello, Brennan and DeVidas ,P.C. He told me to ask for Chris Brennan saying that he's a young, bright gentleman who is well respected and will waste no time in dealing with the adjuster to help me collect the wages that are due to me. I called and spoke to Chris explaining my situation and he had me come to his office the very next day for a consult. The end result is that Chris delivered for me and he did this in a timely fashion. He not only had the insurance company bring me current money wise but he was also instrumental in helping me obtain the OK for the surgery that I desperately needed. Lets face one important fact here, weather your going through a divorce or you've been injured on the job or otherwise you want to know that the people or person you've hired to represent you in the court room is a competent and savvy individual. If your unsure as to who could help you in a tight situation that you never asked nor  expected to be in and your going to thumb through a phone book to pick a lawyer......Don't, call Costello, Brennan and DeVidas and let them prove to you like they proved to me that they can and will live up to their reputation as a class" A" law firm.

The Costello, Brennan and DeVidas, P.C. office, specifically Anthony Sasso, Esq., was extremely helpful and attentive helping me through a personal matter during a difficult time. The results we super positive and the stress was minimal. I recommend.

I want to thank Kieran Costello and his team at Costello, Brennan and DeVidas.

Kieran helped me get through the most difficult time in my life.  He and his team were always fast to respond to my questions and gave me good advice at a time that when I found it difficult to think straight.  He always took the time to explain the process to me.  Kieran went out of his way to get the other side to work with us and come to a settlement.He worked to bring closure and expedite the divorce.

I never felt as though I was just an account at his firm.    Not only did Costello, Brennan and DeVidas handle all of the issues involved with my divorce, they treated me with kindness, patience and understanding.
Kieran truly helped me to get back on my feet and re-start my life.

I wouldn't want anyone to have to go though the pain of divorce, but if you find yourself in the same position that I faced, I highly recommend Kieran to help you get through it.

We were hit with a situation that we had no idea how to handle. Justin was recommended to us and he was phenomenal. He called us back quickly, was a great listener and gave us very thoughtful responses. Justin proceeded to do a lot of research, and concluded that another attorney, with experience in our case, was better suited to help us. He was right – the attorney he found for us was exactly who we needed. Justin was professional, compassionate, thorough and beyond helpful. We are so impressed with Justin and highly recommend him.
Excellent and timely. Everything went smoothly and was very clearly explained.

We finally decided to write our Will and wanted to be sure it was done properly. Having done some extensive research we found Justin Pugh and Associates. Justin was very thorough and professional putting together this will for our current circumstance. He brought up thoughts and ideas we had not considered and asked questions in order to tailor the will to our specific needs. We have great confidence in Justin Pugh & Associates for any further legal needs we may have. We highly recommend this business.

I reached out to Justin regarding some estate planning and probate issues. He was great. Got right back to me. Answered all my crazy questions clearly. He was very professional and extremely helpful. I would use him again.
We hired Justin to help with contracts for our small business. He worked quickly and efficiently and was very communicative throughout the whole process. We felt like we were in good hands.
Professional and thoughtful. Helpful

Mark was brilliant. Seems to know everyone at the Stamford Housing Court (judges, clerks, lawyers, mediators etc). He prevented my potential eviction and actually negotiated a lower rent moving forward. Given my future savings his very reasonable fee will easily pay for itself
I cannot recommend him too highly

I’m currently working with attorney Sank and he is quite knowledgeable and he give a fierce defense. It’s been a battle but I do have confidence in attorney Sank. He is a great attorney and will recommend him to anyone that’s in a bind with a cooked landlord. Additionally, I just got victory over BLT. Attorney Sank tore them down they didn’t stand a chance with the lies. I’m glad the truth manifested itself and the judge was able to see through the lies and weigh the evidence that attorney Sank put together very thoroughly. If you need a housing attorney, he comes highly recommended because he knows how to deal with the complexity of cases to at lying landlords can bring forth. And this was not about not paying my rent.

Mark was fantastic. He was honest and very efficient on my eviction case. He helped walk us through the steps and saved us alot of heart ache. If you have a tenant that needs evicting go to Mark, he has tons of experience and will get great results.

Mark and his team has been very professional and polite

I dint know how I got into this tenant Her name is Febe metos she has been evicted twice in stamford her brother who works for me asked a favor as let her stay temporarily that became and extension without rent I had no hopes my friend referred me to Mark he made me confident from the 1st day he said he will takecare of it

it took us 2 months and it was done I lost 6 months of restless sleep and stress but when I saw Mark in court standing for me I felt 👍

highly recommend him 👌 👏

Attorney Sank presented us as landlords on an eviction case. Mark helped us to reach agreement during our first court hearing.  I valued his professionalism by explaining what we should have expected before hand and making it very smooth, effective, efficient.  We will use his service again.
Mark Sank is a no nonsense realestate attorney that gets the job done. I would personally highly recommend him.

Mark Sank is a consummate professional that helped my wife and I deal with a difficult situation with a former landlord. He is incredibly responsive and gave sound advice to remedy the situation and minimize our costs. I highly recommend leveraging for any of your legal needs and have him on speed dial in the event I ever need him again.

Attorney Sank handled my case quickly and efficiently. His expertise and professionalism made the process smooth and stress-free. I truly appreciate his dedication and clear communication. Highly recommend!
Mark was great. Highly recommend!
I have worked with many attorneys and I must say that Mark Sank is one of the best. He did an excellent job to litigate my case to my fullest satisfaction.
If you want top-notch legal representation without the BS, look no further, Mark is your guy. 5 stars!
I would never work with  Mark Sank again. He operates on lies and deceit.  Unprofessional and vile.

Attorney Sank isTheeeeeeeee best attorney everrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrr
He is not a star but a 'Galaxy'
He will fight for his client(s) till the end....

Mark is the real deal.  He helped us with a tenant situation.  He is quick, efficient and always pleasant. We never had to wait for our emails or phone calls to be answered.  In fact, he reached out to us on a Sunday which I would have never expected him to do.  Paula was wonderful and always kept us informed as soon as there was any information regarding our case. We couldn’t ask for anyone better.  We had a very positive experience and would definitely recommend him.  He’s #1 for us.
Thank you, Mark!
Maria and Ray Saumell

Mark Sank aside from being a great lawyer he is an amazing human being. Thank you for the elite service you provided. You saved me money time and most of all relief! People look at his service as an investment that will save you lots of money! Peace and love ✌🏾
He was rude and condescending. Extremely unprofessional

Mark is the consummate professional and did an outstanding job helping us resolve a legal issue. He’s extremely knowledgeable and was very responsive despite having a busy schedule. Mark’s advice was spot on and we really appreciated his candor. Overall we’d highly recommend Mark as a very capable and client friendly attorney.
Mark is knowledgeable and easy to work with. Moved quickly and got to a quick resolution on a landlord/tenant dispute. Would recommend to everyone.

Mark was referred to me by someone I know in the business. We used him for our closing in may ‘21. The experience was effortless and laid everything out for us in a very easy understandable way. I recently reached out to mark who returned my call himself. We had an issue when chase bought our loan from another vendor and Chase implemented their own terms and policies onto our loan which we had not originally had in our previous agreement. I had been fighting with chase on this matter for over 6 weeks and they constantly told me there is nothing they can do because they are the rules and policies their company enforce. after speaking with mark and taking his advice (which he gave me free of charge), chase changed there stance within 10 minutes. Can’t thank mark enough for the initial treatment we received to the follow up over a year and a half later to help me resolve a very frustrating situation with chase.

Mark helped a family friend who was being discriminated against by her building's management company/landlord. He got her landlord to withdraw their action to evict her, which was based on false pretenses. My wife and I have also consulted with Mark regarding issues with two management companies/landlords in Stamford. We find him very responsive and compassionate.

Mark Sank is an exceptional lawyer. He resolved my landlord-tenant issue quickly and with impressive tenacity. Other lawyers tried to take advantage of me, charging me and then not doing anything on my behalf. Mark's help was invaluable. He is a miracle worker.

Mark Sank helped my neighbor who was facing eviction by a big Stamford developer/mgmt company for a lease violation she did not commit. He resolved her issue swiftly and treated her with the utmost respect -- unlike other lawyers she had hired previously. In my own dealings with Mark, he has been very responsive. When he could not help me himself, he pointed me in the right direction and/or referred other lawyers. Mark is an impressive attorney who did a really good deed by going to bat for someone very deserving.

I've used Mark Sank twice. The first in 2016 when I bought a condo in Stamford, and again in 2022 when I sold the same condo. For both transactions Mark and his team went above and beyond to get the job done. I always felt supported and that they were looking out for my best interests. First class service, thank you Mark & team for your counsel!!
Great law firm!

Mark Sank was so incredibly helpful advising me with detailed information about how to handle a difficult situation with a party who breached a contract. Even though I am not yet officially his client and he went out of his way to help me understand my options and do some initial research.
When this guy has a job to do, he gets it done! There's no one I'd rather have on my side.
Mark was great. Efficient, knowledgeable, transparent, honest. What more could you ask for - highly recommend !

My first experience working with a lawyer, and this firm was completely incredible. Mark is honest, clear without a hint of condescension, and so willing to represent the little guy.

Plus, because he is honest in his billing practices and efficient with his time, I ended up getting 85% of my retainer back.

Could not recommend this lawyer more!
Mark and team are great. They were able to resolve my case quickly and with great professionalism. They kept us informed from the beginning to the end.

Professional, organized, efficient, supportive, reliable, assertive, and a great listener Attorney Mark Sank is all the above! Attorney Sank gets the job done quickly, and with results! Mark helped me with a housing matter and it was resolved without going to trial, which saved me both money and a piece of mind. His paralegals and staff kept me abreast to my case. They also, itemized professional services rendered and keep an accounting of my balance.

I could have not asked for a more proficient lawyer! Attorney Mark Sank is top notch,  no nonsense,  a Super Lawyer! When I felt like I wanted to give up he pushed me harder and gave me the strength to fight for what was rightfully mines. I highly recommend Attorney Mark Sank!

Mark and his team are amazing Very well communicated people respond to every emails and phone calls on hours and after hours and  worked really hard to put up good fight for me to get what I want.
Thank you mark and to all your staff

My husband and I found Mark Sank and his team very professional and responsive.  Mark was a good listener and clearly knew landlord tenant law inside out.  As a result of Mark's expertise and efficiency we were able to swiftly recoup full reimbursement for the debt owed us. We would absolutely use Mark again and refer him to anyone who is looking for assistance with real estate issues.

Mark and his team handled our closing.  Communication was very effective.  Everything was done timely accurate and with attention to the details.  I would highly recommend Attorney Sank and his firm Mark Sank & Associates.

I found Mark to be extremely knowledgeable and effective when working on my case.  I greatly appreciated that he would respond so quickly via email or a call to ensure that things progressed as necessary.  Based upon his work on my case, I would highly recommend Mark to represent folks in any of his specialties.

Mark helped many years ago with my father's estate, and over the years he has advised me numerous times on other matters. His work on the estate was excellent, and his advice has always been thoughtful and helpful, so my wife and I called him a few months ago to represent us in a slightly unconventional house purchase. Mark handled the entire process with his usual attentiveness, clarity, and aplomb, and we have only good things to say about his representation. To put it simply, we felt protected all along the way. With Mark, you don't just have a lawyer working for you; you have a true advocate at your back.
Mark offered great advice and turned everything around very quickly. He educated me throughout the process so I could make the best decisions, and we got the house we wanted and are thrilled.
Very impressed by the degree of Mark Sank's professionalism and experience. Managed a complicated and lengthy transaction to a very satisfactory conclusion. Highly recommend.

I hired Mark Sank after having a bad experience with another lawyer. Night and Day difference between the two. Mark was professional and responded to all of my questions promptly. He handled a Landlord Tenant dispute and was knowledgable and ended up winning the case.

Mark and his team helped me with my condo closing . From the get go he and his paralegal was very effective communicating and keeping me updated on the status at different stages of the process. When things got a bit complicated during the final stages Mark offered sound legal advice and represented me very well in closing the deal.I would  Highly Recommend Mark Sank for all your Real Estate needs. Thank you Mark !

Mark worked with me on a legal action about which I had little knowledge and thus was quite anxious about.   Mark immediately put my mind at ease and walked me through the steps and options to close the matter in a patient, thorough and plain-spoken manner.   Simply put, Mark really knows his stuff and his client service was outstanding! reviews.text:
I’m leaving a poor review based on an intake conversation I had with a very dismissive agent. I stated that I had three potential claims I would like to review.

The agent was very curt with poor social skills. The first claim was not something the firm was interested in which I accept and assign no fault for. Because the first claim did not work out, the agent appeared to try to dismiss me from the conversation for the second two potential claims based on what appeared to be a presupposition regarding my value because the first claim did not work out.

I persuaded the agent to remain in the conversation despite his curt dismissal, but the agent did not appear to listen to the subsequent requests because he had already decided he was going to dismiss me as a person completely. He made blanket statements and suggestions which were not true and were frankly rude, suggesting neither I nor another firm I was working with had done due diligence. Every statement he made after his initial dismissal was more aggravating than the first, making statements that were applicable to the first dismissed claim but had no applicability to potential subsequent claims.

Update: Instead of trying to rectify the issue with me, the firm is asking Google to remove the review. My review is based on my true experience with the firm. If the firm wants to resolve the issue, it should reform its intake process.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Based on other reviews, this person isn't using their real name. It's entirely unfair to 'review' and not give us a chance to figure out what happened by hiding the name. We're asking Google re remove this review.

We are unable to rectify the situation unless this reviewer calls us with his real name and at least gives us the ability to know who this is and what it is that transpired on the call. Regretably, 'Tad McCalister' is a pseudonym and are unable to identify the customer. - S.Lemberg (203) 653-2250 x5500

Although no amount of money could compensate James for the damages incurred, Peter ensured that the defendants were held accountable. "A Connecticut lawyer [Philip D. Russell] who destroyed a laptop containing pornographic images of children last year while he was advising the Greenwich church that discovered them pleaded guilty Thursday in federal court.

The lawyer, Philip D. Russell, 48, pleaded guilty to one count of misprision, or assisting the commission of a felony by failing to report it or by concealing it."

Had he continued to fight the charge, he would have stood trial on two counts of obstruction of justice, charges that could have resulted in much harsher penalties. Misprision is a felony, and Mr. Russell still faces the possible loss or suspension of his law license."

-- "Lawyer Admits Destroying Evidence of Pornography," by Alison Leigh Cowan, New York Times, Sept. 28, 2007

I’m truly grateful for her professionalism and dedication. I highly recommend Attorney Kasra to anyone seeking reliable and compassionate immigration representation.

“Dr. Marjan Kasra is not just an immigration attorney she is a force of hope, strategy, and integrity.”

From the very beginning, Dr. Kasra was the best thing that happened to me. She listens deeply, speaks honestly, and acts with purpose. What sets her apart is not just her legal expertise, but her genuine empathy you feel it in every conversation. As an immigrant herself, she understands the emotional weight and complexity that comes with immigration journeys. That authenticity makes all the difference.

I worked with her on my EB1A petition, and thanks to her and her exceptional team, I received my approval. It wasn’t a smooth ride. I had RFEs, and that’s where Dr. Kasra truly shined. She crafted a powerful, fact-based, and compelling response that turned the tide.

What I appreciate most? She’s not a cheerleader she’s a realist. During the initial review, she told me I had a 50–60% chance. Once the case was finalized, she felt 70% confident. After the RFE, her confidence grew not because she’s blindly optimistic, but because she stands behind the strength of her work. She’s there when it matters most, and she never overpromises but she always delivers.

To me, Dr. Kasra is now my immigration lawyer for life. I will go to her for all my family’s immigration needs, and without hesitation, refer anyone seeking guidance. If you want someone who combines legal precision, human compassion, and fearless advocacy, Dr. Kasra is the attorney to trust.

I cannot express enough gratitude for the outstanding legal support we received from the Office of Lawmaks, particularly from Attorney Kasra. From the moment we engaged with her, it was clear that we were in the hands of a truly exceptional immigration attorney.

Navigating the complexities of U.S. immigration law can be overwhelming, but Attorney Kasra’s deep knowledge, professionalism, and understanding made the entire process seamless and far less stressful. She expertly assisted our family in securing an extension of our B2 visas and successfully guided us through the Change of Status (COS) process—transitioning my wife to F1 status and my children and me to F2.

What truly sets Attorney Kasra apart is her unwavering dedication to her clients. She ensured that every document was meticulously prepared and submitted on time, leaving no room for error or delay. Her keen attention to deadlines and legal intricacies reassured us throughout the waiting periods with USCIS, which can often be nerve-wracking. Thanks to her diligence, we never had to worry about falling out of status.

Beyond her technical expertise, Attorney Kasra is compassionate, patient, and genuinely committed to her clients’ success. She took the time to address all our concerns, providing clarity and confidence at every step. Her ability to balance legal precision with a personal touch is truly rare in this field.

For anyone in need of an immigration attorney who is not only highly skilled but also deeply invested in her clients’ well-being, I wholeheartedly recommend Attorney Kasra and the Office of Lawmaks. They are, without a doubt, the best legal team to have on your side!

reviews.text:
Attorney Dr. Allan Friedman is a life saver.  The way he handled this court appearance today was beyond impeccable and unparalleled as to where I would be standing right now.  I had very little knowledge of what was going on and my Probation Officer had told me very quickly on the 15th of March where I was suppose to be.  I had told him that I had two addresses of where I live.  The Adult Probation Officer was not having it and he told me that this would be a Red Flag because I had been extradited from New York to Connecticut.  I had told the Clinic in Intake in New York that I needed medications for the mental disorder that I had and wasn't offered any.  Once I got to Connecticut the officers took me to the hospital for my meds, I was there for two (2) days and Attorney Dr. Allan Friedman bailed me out from Connecticut.  I was at my parents home for about 3 hours because all my property and car was seized in New York and taken to my parents home.  Luckily my Savior Attorney Allan Friedman got me out of this jam.  The prosecutors in the DA's Office was bringing on additional charges that had transpired from 2020 which was four (4) years ago from the same complainant.  The prosecutor was drilling my Attorney how I would not be safe for the community and the Public because I had Order of Protection Violation and they had insinuated to the court that they would raise my bond.
Attorney Dr. Allan Friedman stood up for me and went behind the judge and gave the judge the paperwork of all the medical treatments I had undergone for the past four (4) years and this incident occurred just now in March of 2024 where I had a new charge.  Attorney Allan Friedman told the courts that I was in good standing with the order of protection and that I hadn't violated it for four (4) years until now because I have a child with the complainant.  Attorney Dr. Allan Friedman stood by me and represented me with the fullest knowledge and extent to the law that he was going to prevent me from going to jail because he knew that I had been abiding by the law and the order of protection till this incident had occurred and was initiated from the complainant.  This is a testament to the devotion that Attorney Dr. Allan Friedman has toward his client and the manner in which he conducted himself today in the courts is beyond words can explain.  The professionalism, the dedication, the perseverance to fight for one's right is proof of how I am still here alive writing this testimonial live as the court appearance was today.  I have no words to explain how I feel today as Attorney Dr. Allan Friedman blows any type of Defense Attorney out of the water because he truly cares about the people he represents, he understands and gathers the information with quick precise detail, and comes up with solutions that gives life and results to the defendant's he represents.  I am jaw shocked as to how this beautiful individual came up with all the resources he had in his arsenal to keep me standing alive today in writing this testimonial.  This is not only amazing work by this individual, this goes above and beyond caring for people whenever they are in the midst of danger, this man is a Guardian Angel sent from Heaven willing to sacrifice, crawl, and work for your rights when everything is collapsing, Attorney Dr. Allan Friedman is there calmly, cool, and collected gathering all the facts and data to coming up with an informed solution to resolve any matter that may stand in your way.
Attorney Allan Friedman was able to convince the judge to keep the bail bond they way it stands (no raise on the bail bond) and have me continue to be going through the treatment that I need in order to continue moving this case forward and having it resolved.  May God, Jesus Christ, and The Holy Spirit bless Attorney Dr. Allan Friedman because he not only got me out of this jam but saved my life from going to a place where I would never want to go.  If you need any kind of help with any situation that you are in, please reach out to this Amazing Epitome of an Impeccable individual.

reviews.text: Paul Slager and Nicole Coates handled my personal injury case, procuring a substantial award in arbitration. From our first meeting, they were warm, kind, empathetic, and gentle, helping me to navigate an incredibly challenging healing process. At every turn, they remained focused on what I needed to feel empowered and witnessed. They were flexible and patient, and went down some unusual and creative paths at my request. In a field that can be quite delicate and fraught, they were always sensitive to my needs and wellbeing, and I remain extremely grateful for their support and their professionalism.

Nicole Coates and Paul Slager are exceptionally skilled, professional, and results-driven attorneys. Their team is not only highly skilled but also relentlessly aggressive when it comes to fighting for their clients best outcomes. They communicate clearly, provide consistent updates throughout the process, and make you feel fully supported every step of the way.

If you are looking for attorneys who combine compassion with tenacity and truly advocate for their clients, I strongly recommend working with them. I am incredibly grateful for their dedication and guidance during such a difficult time.

Paul, Nicole, and the entire team at Slager Madry are supremely skilled, effective, honest, patient, and compassionate. If you seek legal counsel, look no further; you will be in caring and capable hands.

The team at Slager Madry are top notch.  They are compassionate, dedicated, professional and knowledgeable.   But best of all, they made it personal…

At each step of the way we were able to reach out to Attorneys Paul Slager and Nicole Coates personally.  We never felt like just another case, or that we had to go through an answering service to get in touch with them.  When we reached out, they always responded.

They took time to learn about our family situation on a personal level.  Beyond just what we needed for the legal matter, they listened and they cared.

As my sisters and I went through this process, when questions came up they would answer via email, phone call or zoom—whichever worked best for us, at all different times of day.  They would check in with each one of us personally to make each of our questions were answered and we were all comfortable in the direction.

All of that was matched by their legal expertise, strategic thinking and a steady, calming hand guiding us through the entire process.

I’ll forever be grateful to Paul, Nicole and the entire team.  I absolutely, without any reservation, recommend them.  You will not find a better combination of kindness and competence.

There are very few words that can describe the level of expertise and care that was provided by the Slager Madry team. Some that come to mind are: exemplary, steadfast, intuitive, honest, compassionate, principled, communicative, patient, strategic, and just simply incredible. Paul and Nicole led the charge to help our family through an impossible time and we were able to cross a finish line with a feeling of justice and peace. Those are gifts that I am utterly confident no other team could have given us. I am thankful for the rest of my life for their work.

My experience with Slager Madry was truly exceptional. Every member of their team treated me with kindness, respect, and professionalism. I always felt heard, supported, and valued, and their genuine care made a lasting impression. I wholeheartedly recommend them to anyone seeking a compassionate and trustworthy legal team.

Medical Malpractice and wrongful death causes lifelong suffering with everlasting family damage and we needed justice. Our king 👑 Pop Pop suffered a fatal injury due to what we knew was pure negligence! Words can’t describe the pain we felt and still have to this very day! Paul and his fabulous team got us legal justice, maximum enforcement of consequences and for that they are a part of our family forever! #MedicalMalpractice #PatientRights #LegalHelp #JusticeForPatients

I want to express my deepest gratitude to the entire team at Slager Madry. My journey began with Attorney Paul Slager and Attorney Nicole Coates at their former firm and concluded at their new firm, Slager Madry. From day one until the very end, they demonstrated an extraordinary level of professionalism. What truly stood out to me, though, were their kindness, compassion, and the respectful way they treated me throughout this difficult process.
I had gone through extremely challenging times as the victim of medical malpractice. Attorney Paul Slager believed in me from the beginning and accepted my case when I felt my most vulnerable. He represented me with unwavering dedication, ultimately achieving a very positive settlement outcome. I am profoundly grateful to both Paul and Nicole for everything they have done.
The entire team worked with remarkable attention to detail and commitment. Their professionalism made it possible for me to feel that justice had been served. At every step, they met me with empathy, patience, and respect. Their loyalty to their client—something I had never expected to this degree—was truly remarkable.
During this process, I was overwhelmed emotionally, managing serious health challenges, and facing extensive paperwork. The team made everything feel manageable.
If you believe you may have a case, I can say with complete sincerity that Attorney Paul Slager and Nicole Coates are exceptional advocates. I don’t know if all attorneys are as genuinely human and caring as they are, but I feel incredibly fortunate to have had such an outstanding experience. In the end, everything turned out well, and I wish the entire Slager Madry team continued success in helping others who have suffered from medical malpractice.

The team at Slager Madry is truly exceptional - professional, compassionate, and dedicated in every way. During one of the hardest times of our lives, Attorney Paul Slager became not only an expert advocate but also a compassionate ally to our family. From start to finish, we met directly with the attorneys handling our case, which made us feel seen and valued rather than just another number.

Our case was deeply complex, and the Slager Madry team went above and beyond to find the right experts to represent it accurately and effectively. At every stage, their communication, empathy, and professionalism were unwavering.

Our family suffered an immeasurable loss with the passing of a beloved husband and father. Attorney Slager took the time to truly learn who he was, ensuring he represented him with dignity and understanding. While nothing can replace our loss, this firm honored our loved one and made us feel that seeking justice was both meaningful and necessary.

We will forever be grateful to Attorney Slager, Attorney Randall, and the entire Slager Madry team for the justice they brought to our family and the care they showed throughout the process.

This firm has helped me tremendously and supported me every step of the way. The entire team is professional, caring, and truly dedicated to their clients. The situation I faced was life changing, but this firm helped me get through it with compassion, guidance, and unwavering support. They always made me feel heard and kept me informed throughout the process. I’m so grateful for their hard work, honesty, and commitment. I highly recommend them to anyone looking for a law firm that truly cares and goes above and beyond for their clients.

Joaquin And the team at Slager Madry LLC helped navigate a very difficult time for our family. We are so grateful for the guidance and support they showed us. They worked hard to ensure the needs of our family were being met.

This process was extremely emotional and overwhelming at times. However, Attorney Madry's professionalism, expertise and compassion made a very difficult situation manageable while negotiating a settlement that far exceeded my expectations.

A person only ever needs a lawyer at the lowest point of their life, so it’s vital that they be excellent. My husband worked at Columbia Law School for ten years, so it was through his connections that we were able to find the absolute best attorneys in Connecticut. This is how we found Paul Slager and Nicole Coates.

They represented us for almost two years and were always ten steps ahead of the opposing counsel. They were infinitely more knowledgeable, strategic and wiser. This was an enormous peace of mind during an incredibly taxing season of my life. I was distraught about the entire situation, having never experienced anything like it, so it was also incredibly meaningful to me that, not only did they bring expertise, but they are also people of the highest ethics and integrity.

I feel indebted to them in the same way I would to a surgeon who saved my life. The difference is that a surgeon commits hours to your well-being, whereas Slager Madry advocated for me with wisdom and kindness for years of their professional lives.

Under the worst circumstances for our family, Slager Madry LLC became counsel on a matter that had many twists and turns and unique challenges.  The details of the case were examined thoroughly and their plan to resolve the case had to be adjusted (on the fly), often!  Slager Madry pivoted, beautifully.

The Partners/Firm were there every step of the way (we never felt that we were in this "alone.")  They didn't hesitate to take calls/zooms on weekends and they were the steadiest hand ever imagined - through successful resolution of our case.  My family is now Slager Madry family and we will never forget their counsel, patience, honesty and integrity.  Upon resolution, Slager Madry suggested equally competent Counsel to handle some Connecticut administrative issues which have also been resolved successfully!!!

Happily, just referred Slager Madry, also!!

A Truly Exceptional Legal Team

Losing our mother in such a sudden and tragic way, struck by a car while walking our dog, was something no family should ever have to endure. During one of the darkest periods of our lives, this law firm was a source of strength, clarity, and unwavering support.

From our very first meeting, they treated us with empathy and respect, taking the time to understand the deep emotional and legal complexities of our case. Their communication was clear and compassionate every step of the way. We never felt like just another case - they genuinely cared about our family, our grief, and our pursuit of justice.

The legal team was thorough, strategic, and fiercely dedicated to ensuring accountability. Their expertise and persistence brought us not only an excellent legal outcome, but also a sense of closure that we didn’t think was possible.

We are deeply grateful for their professionalism, integrity, and humanity. If you are looking for a legal team that will fight for you with heart and skill, look no further. They helped us find a path forward when everything felt impossible.

I want to extend my heartfelt thanks to Alfred and the team at Maya Murphy, P.C. for providing me with invaluable guidance and support during a challenging time for my family. Alfred’s free consultation was not only incredibly informative but also a testament to his genuine care for the people he serves. He took the time to listen, thoroughly assess our situation, and provide thoughtful recommendations to help us navigate a dispute with the Norwalk school district, without immediately resorting to legal action and/or pushing for retainer.

It’s rare to find an attorney who is so transparent and focused on what’s best for the client rather than pushing towards unnecessary litigation. Alfred’s advice gave us a clearer path forward, and his commitment to ensuring children like RJ get the support they need in the school system was evident. I wouldn’t hesitate to recommend Maya Murphy, P.C. to anyone seeking compassionate, knowledgeable, and trustworthy legal guidance.

Thank you again, Alfred, for your invaluable help in ensuring RJ receives a free and appropriate education tailored to his unique needs.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for the excellent review. Al and I are glad we were able to assist you. Our firm has a special passion for education law and helping children and families obtain the services they need and deserve. Thank you again.

reviews.text: Very patient, answering all our questions and great attention to details. Strongly recommend!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for the review. We really appreciate your feedback.

reviews.text: I was not adequately prepared for the call, I was just hoping for a big picture view or the lay of the land. I spoke with the person that answered the phone, assuming it was an intake person. Turns out it was one of the lawyers. The call went fine, but I did not have enough info to make the call useful.

It's my pleasure to submit a positive review for attorney Dan Murphy.

Dan brings integrity to his profession, something I suspect he demonstrates in his personal life as well. During my 13 month divorce, he continually coached me on the value of restraint, always concerned with how any action might be perceived should we head to trial. His patience, coupled with his relentless attention to detail, resulted in a positive outcome when my divorce turned from amicable to litigious.

Dan successfully reduced my now ex-wife's settlement demand by 85%. Her lawyer tried an aggressive approach that Dan's experience and coolheadedness was able to navigate and resolve using the facts of our case.

While I am grateful to settling only weeks before our trial, part of me wishes I could have seen Dan litigate -- his tenacity and willingness to fight on my behalf was a preview I got to glimpse during deposition.

Thank you, Dan.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for the great review. Our firm handles many divorce cases in Connecticut and New York. It is always satisfying when a client appreciates the work we do. Have a great day!

reviews.text: Lauren was absolutely great, she truly care about our situation and how to help us.  She is very knowledgeable and helpful to guide us through.  I couldn’t recommend her and Maya Law more

I highly recommend Lauren A. Jacobson, Esq. from Maya Murphy, P.C. She has provided exceptional legal support for my workplace-related matters over the years. Lauren is knowledgeable, responsive, and genuinely dedicated to her clients. Her proactive approach and clear communication have made a significant difference for me, and I have confidently referred her to many in my network.

Received exception counsel from Joe and Lauren, and a positive outcome to a very challenging situation. Maya Murphy provided the expertise of a high-end blue-chip law firm combined with the personal touch of a local people you can trust.
Lauren and the team at Maya were both helpful and thoughtful in their advice. I wouldn't hesitate to use their services again.

Upon being the winning bidder of a kind donation that was implementation of a living will Maya Murphy made to a Westport FD charity benefit a couple of years ago, I finally got around to making the long overdue call. Met with a gent there named Kevin Florin who handles much of the family estate related items. Kevin could not have been more welcoming, professional, and informative during our two in person meetings (plus very prompt response to numerous email exchanges).
He's also likely the best dressed lawyer in Fairfield county 😉.
I learned a ton, all issues/questions deftly answered, and left MM a very happy, and new, client.
Highly recommend.

I am very appreciative of Maya Murphy as have they helped us navigate our options regarding special education.  They are sharp, respectful, constructive and responsive to your individual circumstance.  My only regret is that I didn't work with Maya Murphy earlier.  You want to work for high integrity, kind people and Maya Murphy fits the bill, top to bottom.

Lauren A. Jacobson, Esq. is outstanding! She took the time to really listen and understand the details of my situation, and provided great feedback. She was caring, professional, extremely knowledgeable, and kind. I would recommend Lauren to anyone in need of legal counsel. Thank you for your help, Lauren!
Had  a general question regarding an employment claim and was treated with respect and was given great advice.

We have had a wonderful experience working with Lauren and Kevin in recent months. We are thoroughly impressed by their breath and depth of legal expertise, patience and dedication. Our target tasks have been smoothly executed. Lauren took great care to explain to us the nuances each step of the way. She also accommodated our varied schedules showing great patience.
We highly recommend Lauren and Kevin to anyone!
Tyler one of the attorneys is rude, you have to babysit him to even do his job, and he tries to get you to pay for fees that you don’t even owe. And he refuses to answer calls or emails for days.

Everyone at Maya and Murphy was fantastic and Kevin was great to work with.
Very grateful.

Lauren from Maya Murphy helped me with her extensive phone consultation. Within that hour, she gave me enough information to successfully fight a legal challenge on behalf of my child. This firm is prompt, professional, and committed to helping families with their great knowledge of the law. They give you what you need to solve your problem. I highly recommend them!! :)

We decided to work with this prestigious law firm because it is advertised on the radio and everywhere. AS A CLIENT PAYING AN ABSURD AMOUNT OF MONEY, I EXPECT PROFESSIONALISM AND BASIC COMMUNICATION. IT IS THE BARE MINIMUM TO ANSWER THE PHONE, RESPOND TO EMAILS, AND UPDATE CLIENTS ON THE STATUS OF THEIR CASE.

I AM NOT SURE WHO IS BEING HIRED HERE, BUT THE LACK OF RESPONSE AND PROFESSIONALISM IS COMPLETELY UNACCEPTABLE. FOR A FIRM THAT ADVERTISES SO MUCH, I EXPECT FAR BETTER SERVICE. YOU NEED TO BE HELD ACCOUNTABLE FOR THIS LEVEL OF DISREGARD TOWARD CLIENTS.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hi Domenica, thank you for taking the time to share your concerns. We understand how important communication is, especially when you are trusting us with something as significant as your case. We take this feedback seriously.

At this time, we would like to review your file directly to understand where the breakdown occurred and correct it immediately. Since we cannot discuss case-specific details publicly, please contact our Client Relations Team at Leadsdepartment@cabanillaslaw.com reply to your last case update message so we can assist you right away.

Your case matters to us, and we are committed to ensuring you receive the attention and clarity you deserve.

Sincerely,
The Cabanillas Law Team

reviews.text: I am very grateful first to God🙏 and to Cabanillas & Associates and their entire work team, the truth is, the best experience and help, thanks to them I was able to obtain my work permit thanks to the youth status... And remember, Cabanillas makes it possible

I usually do not write any reviews, but I am so disappointed that I hope people can read this and DO NOT use this service. I contacted Cabanillas for my divorce, and everything was great. They got me to sign the contract, of course, and after that, the customer service was HORRIBLE. Nobody picks up the phone, they leave you on read on WhatsApp. They do not give you updates about your case; you must chase them, knowing you are the client. One lady oversaw my case, and she left the company. Nobody told me, informed me that she was not in my case anymore, and there was a court date that I was not aware of, and they charged me $750 because I did not show up!! Knowing that the communication was so off, I was unaware of this date/time/place. I kept saying that it was not okay to pay for this, and they kept sending me the invoice, knowing it was all on them. My divorce ended up costing me way more than what they told me, and I was always looking for someone to give me updates since their communication is so poor. I am so disappointed and would not recommend this team to anybody!

Attorney Vishno met me during one of the hardest times of my life after a very serious car accident while I was also dealing with personal challenges. From the very beginning, nothing deterred him. He stepped in and immediately guided me in the right direction with confidence and clarity.

His reputation throughout the state truly speaks for itself. Attorney Vishno is a lethal litigator who knows how to advocate for his clients and take control of difficult situations.

The office is run smoothly and very professionally, and a special shoutout to Jackie, his paralegal, for being incredibly responsive and helpful throughout the process.

Attorney Vishno and Gina showed exceptional honesty and care throughout my case. Their support made a difficult time much easier, and I always felt they had my best interest at heart. I would absolutely recommend them to anyone needing legal help.

After being involved in a car accident and suffering some decent injuries, I was referred to Attorney Jeremy Vishno by another attorney who told me that if he was in my shoes, he would want Jeremy handling the case.  From the start of my case until the end, Jeremy was exceptional and his expertise was evident.  Jeremy was professional, knowledgable and a great communicator.  I can't say enough about Jeremy, and I would highly recommend him.

I had the pleasure of working with Jeremy and his team for the past several years involving a complex MVA case. I can’t speak highly enough of their professionalism, knowledge, empathy and integrity.

I always felt included in the process, but not mired in the details.  Jeremy is the perfect balance of attorney and trusted confident. And his team of excellent paralegals helped move the process along flawlessly.

Although my case was complex and at time stressful, as these things can be, I felt in extremely good hands.

I highly recommend Vishno law firm, and would absolutely use them again.
Excellent
Vishno Law Firm should be a model for how all business’s operate. They are kind, courteous, punctual. They demand justice and fairness and their advice is sound and comforting.
The best been working with Mr Lasnick for years

David and Lorri took care of our latest transaction and went above and beyond. This is our third transaction with him and he navigated some challenging issues to perfection. If you’re looking for someone who knows what he’s doing, you need look no further than David.
Experience and professionalism. You can't go wrong with David and his team.
Very prompt responsiveness and quick resolution requested assistance!

I'm delighted to work with them, a very organized team. Mrs. Lea is very kind. I'm completely satisfied and happy to see the results. I hope everyone is lucky enough to find this office and have good results. Blessings to all. ☺️

I had told him that I had two addresses of where I live.  The Adult Probation Officer was not having it and he told me that this would be a Red Flag because I had been extradited from New York to Connecticut.  I had told the Clinic in Intake in New York that I needed medications for the mental disorder that I had and wasn't offered any.  Once I got to Connecticut the officers took me to the hospital for my meds, I was there for two (2) days and Attorney Dr. Allan Friedman bailed me out from Connecticut.  I was at my parents home for about 3 hours because all my property and car was seized in New York and taken to my parents home.  Luckily my Savior Attorney Allan Friedman got me out of this jam.  The prosecutors in the DA's Office was bringing on additional charges that had transpired from 2020 which was four (4) years ago from the same complainant.  The prosecutor was drilling my Attorney how I would not be safe for the community and the Public because I had Order of Protection Violation and they had insinuated to the court that they would raise my bond.
Attorney Dr. Allan Friedman stood up for me and went behind the judge and gave the judge the paperwork of all the medical treatments I had undergone for the past four (4) years and this incident occurred just now in March of 2024 where I had a new charge.  Attorney Allan Friedman told the courts that I was in good standing with the order of protection and that I hadn't violated it for four (4) years until now because I have a child with the complainant.  Attorney Dr. Allan Friedman stood by me and represented me with the fullest knowledge and extent to the law that he was going to prevent me from going to jail because he knew that I had been abiding by the law and the order of protection till this incident had occurred and was initiated from the complainant.  This is a testament to the devotion that Attorney Dr. Allan Friedman has toward his client and the manner in which he conducted himself today in the courts is beyond words can explain.  The professionalism, the dedication, the perseverance to fight for one's right is proof of how I am still here alive writing this testimonial live as the court appearance was today.  I have no words to explain how I feel today as Attorney Dr. Allan Friedman blows any type of Defense Attorney out of the water because he truly cares about the people he represents, he understands and gathers the information with quick precise detail, and comes up with solutions that gives life and results to the defendant's he represents.  I am jaw shocked as to how this beautiful individual came up with all the resources he had in his arsenal to keep me standing alive today in writing this testimonial.  This is not only amazing work by this individual, this goes above and beyond caring for people whenever they are in the midst of danger, this man is a Guardian Angel sent from Heaven willing to sacrifice, crawl, and work for your rights when everything is collapsing, Attorney Dr. Allan Friedman is there calmly, cool, and collected gathering all the facts and data to coming up with an informed solution to resolve any matter that may stand in your way.
Attorney Allan Friedman was able to convince the judge to keep the bail bond they way it stands (no raise on the bail bond) and have me continue to be going through the treatment that I need in order to continue moving this case forward and having it resolved.  May God, Jesus Christ, and The Holy Spirit bless Attorney Dr. Allan Friedman because he not only got me out of this jam but saved my life from going to a place where I would never want to go.  If you need any kind of help with any situation that you are in, please reach out to this Amazing Epitome of an Impeccable individual.

I cannot thank Attorney Bob Cavanaugh enough for his exceptional service. From start to finish, he was incredibly professional and made sure to handle all of my questions promptly and thoroughly. He was always accommodating to my needs and requests, and his patience throughout the entire process was greatly appreciated. Bob and his legal team went above and beyond, guiding me every step of the way and ensuring I understood each detail along the way. I am truly grateful for their support, and I highly recommend Bob Cavanaugh to anyone seeking knowledgeable and caring legal representation!
Awesome Lawyer, Thanks Bob!

The Cavanaugh Law office was amazing helping me with my case. Bob made the process very easy to understand by explaining everything with detail and patience. I am very happy after working with Bob and highly recommend his law firm!

Atty Cavanaugh was confident, patient, and his experience and knowledge were instrumental to my favorable outcome - which was  much more than I initially anticipated. He was a pleasure to work with and I highly recommend him!
He is a wonderful lawyer and always made me feel comfortable. He is very patient and will get you the most.
Professional , dependable , my family always uses this man’s services .
Bob is an amazing lawyer and equally as friendly a person to work with! I would never even consider anyone else.

Bob did a wonderful job settling my case. I trusted his expertise 100% and I am very happy with the settlement that I received. Bob always has good advice and handled my case in a very professional manner. I would definitely recommend Bob to anyone who needs an attorney.

I myself would give Attorney Cavanaugh more then 5 stars if possible!!! This very qualified atty helped my son avoid a serious potential  felony charge .Atty Cavanaugh was kind and understanding and above all non judgemental! Give this attorney a call   and see for yourself THANKS ATTY CAVANAUGH!

Attorney Cavanaugh is a great lawyer! He kept in frequent contact with me to discuss the progress of my case. He was very easy to talk to and I felt that he gave me 100%. He settled my case quickly and my settlement  was much higher than expected. I highly recommend him!

Mr. Cavanaugh genuinely cares for his clients. He shows compassion,understanding, and patience with every conversation you have with him. Attorney Cavanaugh is trust worthy, knowledgeable, and readily available. Working in the interest of his clients, he provides great results and supersedes your expectations. I highly recommend him.

Atty. Cavanaugh is a trust worthy, competent and honest Attorney who truly cares for his clients. He is easy to work with, approachable and always available for his clients and works in the best interests of his clients. Highly recommended.
